framework.name: General Interoperability Framework (RGI)
framework.scope: Interoperability standards for French government information systems, including security aspects of data exchange
framework.structure_description: Recommendations for technical, syntactic, semantic, and organizational interoperability with security requirements for data exchange protocols.

controls.title: Secure data exchange protocols
controls.description: Government data exchanges shall use secure protocols (HTTPS, SFTP, AS4) with mutual authentication.
controls.description_nl: Les echanges de donnees gouvernementaux doivent utiliser des protocoles securises (HTTPS, SFTP, AS4) avec authentification mutuelle.

controls.title: XML and JSON security
controls.description: XML and JSON payloads shall be validated against schemas, with protection against injection and XXE attacks.
controls.description_nl: Les charges utiles XML et JSON doivent etre validees par rapport a des schemas, avec protection contre les attaques d'injection et XXE.

controls.title: Digital signature for official documents
controls.title_nl: Signature numerique pour les documents officiels
controls.description: Official electronic documents shall be digitally signed using RGS-compliant signature mechanisms.
controls.description_nl: Les documents electroniques officiels doivent etre signes numeriquement en utilisant des mecanismes de signature conformes au RGS.

controls.title: API security standards
controls.description: Government APIs shall implement OAuth 2.0/OpenID Connect, rate limiting, input validation, and API gateway protection.
controls.description_nl: Les API gouvernementales doivent implementer OAuth 2.0/OpenID Connect, la limitation de debit, la validation des entrees et la protection par passerelle API.

controls.title: Certificate requirements for interoperability
controls.description: Use certificates from RGS-qualified certification authorities for inter-administration authentication and encryption.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser des certificats provenant d'autorites de certification qualifiees RGS pour l'authentification et le chiffrement inter-administrations.

controls.title: Interoperability audit trail
controls.description: All inter-system data exchanges shall be logged with sender, receiver, timestamp, and transaction identifier.
controls.description_nl: Tous les echanges de donnees inter-systemes doivent etre journalises avec l'emetteur, le recepteur, l'horodatage et l'identifiant de transaction.
